remarks: Beautifully sited in prestigious Greens Farms this timeless 5 BR, 6BA clapboard-and-stone Colonial offers stunning architecture & resort like privacy just moments from train, town & beaches. A gracious front porch & exquisite landscaping create an immediate sense of presence; classic, composed & quietly impressive. Inside, a soaring entry filled w/natural light introduces interiors defined by beautiful scale, 9-ft ceilings & gracious flow. Formal living room w/gas fireplace & dining room w/wet bar lend elegance to entertaining while a handsome office/den w/custom built-ins offers warmth & intimacy. The kitchen is refined & inviting w/quartz countertops, Sub-Zero appliances, walk-in pantry & breakfast/dining area opening to bluestone terrace. The expansive family room anchored by a substantial stone fireplace creates a natural gathering place & French doors open seamlessly to the outdoor living space. The main level also includes a secondary entry w/back staircase, laundry room, additional office & 2nd powder room. Upstairs the primary suite is a true retreat w/oversized walk-in closets, dressing area & spa-like marble bath. 4 additional generously proportioned bedrooms including two en-suite offer flexibility for family & guests. Finished 3rd fl ideal for playroom, gym, media room, 6th BR. Outside sprawling grounds, expansive bluestone terraces, exceptional masonry & stunning saltwater gunite pool & spa create a private oasis w/serene resort-like feel. Impeccably presented.
